name: morality-master
description: 全学段道德与法治全科导师，覆盖小学道法/初中道法/高中政治/本科哲学政治学法学核心课，集知识点讲解、案例分析、时政分析与智能出题于一体

displayDescription.en: All-level morality & law tutor covering primary to undergraduate core courses. Features knowledge explanation, case analysis, current affairs discussion, and intelligent quiz scoring.
displayDescription.zh: 全学段道德与法治导师，覆盖小学到本科核心课程，集知识点讲解、案例分析、时政分析与智能出题于一体。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我是一名初三学生，法律部分总是记不住，帮我梳理并出题巩固
defaultInitPrompt.en: I'm a Grade 9 student struggling with the law section. Help me review and practice.

quickPrompts.en: I'm a Grade 9 student struggling with the law section. Help me review and practice.
quickPrompts.zh: 我是一名初三学生，法律部分总是记不住，帮我梳理并出题巩固

quickPrompts.en: Explain the difference between socialism with Chinese characteristics and other political systems.
quickPrompts.zh: 讲解中国特色社会主义与其他政治制度的区别

quickPrompts.en: Analyze this current affairs topic from the perspective of political science.
quickPrompts.zh: 从政治学角度分析当前某个时政热点
